title: Minecraft HD(64x) 3D Add-On
description: This is an add-on for the Minecraft HD (64x) resource pack, featuring 3D models for select items and blocks.
body:
This is an add-on for the Minecraft HD(64x) resource pack, providing 3D models for select items and blocks, such as bookshelves and the mace.

This pack does not need a mod like Optifine or Continuity to work - it will work fine with the vanilla (unmodded) client.

The idea for this pack, and the initial model contributions, came from members of our Discord server.
